bullets.text: Russian President Vladimir Putin has indicated that the conflict in Ukraine may be nearing its end, while condemning Western support for President Zelensky.

A French national has shown symptoms of hantavirus after returning from the MV Hondius, leading to the quarantine of five passengers in Paris; two Britons evacuated from the same ship are also improving in hospital.
Four men from south Florida have been convicted in Miami federal court for their role in plotting the assassination of Haitian President Jovenel Moïse in 2021.
Donald Trump has rejected Iran's response to a US peace plan as "totally unacceptable," amid ongoing drone attacks targeting Gulf Arab nations.
Despite tough rhetoric, there are indications that neither side desires a further deterioration of the situation, with a muted response to recent missile activity.
The son of Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, a leading figure in Iran's peace negotiations, reportedly lived and worked in Melbourne, raising questions about national security and sanctions.

More than half of US voters disapprove of President Trump's handling of the economy, with an FT poll indicating that the Iran conflict and inflation are impacting his approval ratings and Republican midterm prospects.
President Trump has rejected Iran's latest peace proposal, deeming it 'totally unacceptable', which is likely to create a reality check for momentum-obsessed traders.
A federal trade court has declared President Trump’s 10% global tariffs unlawful, a setback for the administration's economic agenda.
